Near-complete coverage: as of run 26319631743, virtually all open issues have Repo Assist comments. Future runs should focus on re-engaging when NEW human comments appear, or finding genuinely new code improvements not yet attempted.
.github/ is a protected_path_prefix so CI improvements cannot be pushed as PRs.
